tweets.text:
Nice writeup on LLM-driven reverse engineering and countermeasures. My own experiments are aligned with these findings: classic transformations are easily breakable, but there is room for developing obfuscation techniques tailored to LLMs.

https://t.co/3rFtfHQld4
tweets.name: Juan Tapiador

tweets.text:
Chrome looks set to ship an LLM Prompt API to the web platform. At Mozilla, we oppose this API.

We feel it has a large interoperability risk, and Google imposing T&Cs on a web API sets a dangerous precedent.

Full details: https://t.co/fAmHANzAjU
tweets.name: Firefox for Web Developers

Here's how to connect Meta's official Ads MCP Server to Claude in <5 mins:

1. Get either Claude Pro or Max plan for this.

2. Go to https://t.co/lpNJlaA42x. You'll see an option to add a custom MCP server. Name it something.

3. The MCP server URL Meta built is: https://t.co/QekHdL2mWJ https://t.co/1I5SpwOxVJ

Google patched a critical RCE flaw in Gemini CLI allowing attackers to execute code via malicious config files in CI workflows. High-severity Cursor vulnerabilities also enable sandbox escapes through .git hooks. #GeminiCLI #CursorBugs #USA
https://t.co/GJyEgiPEQH
